title: cerastium decalvans var. pseudolanatum
intro: Cerastium decalvans var. pseudolanatum, also known as the mouse-ear chickweed or wintercress, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cerastium decalvans var. pseudolanatum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, burns, and skin conditions.
